event_comments: Note: Some participants on Advanced Beginner were accidentally given different maps at this event – we apologize for the mix up! To ensure everyone gets to see valid results for the map they ran on, we have split Advanced Beginner into three separate classes for this one meet – Advanced Beginner 2, 3X, and 3Y.
